Title: Backfill user stories
Status: Code Present
Verified: true
Backdated: 2026-04-23
Milestone: Add module chat flows and story backfill docs

As a product owner
I want backdated user stories in the repository
So that history can later be audited and squashed against product intent

Acceptance Criteria:
- [x] Stories are stored under .github/user-stories/oliver-app.
- [x] Each story has sequential US-OLV IDs.
- [x] Each story includes status, verified flag, backdated date, milestone, narrative, criteria, and notes.
- [x] The index table lists every generated story.

Notes: This story describes the backfill artifact itself.
